blocks.headline: Ops Desk
blocks.sub: Submit an operations request and track it in the open queue. One form, one list — no email threads, no lost tickets.

blocks.html:
New request

Open requests

TitleRequesterPriorityStatus
Loading…
blocks.css: .od-wrap{max-width:1080px;margin:0 auto;padding:48px 20px}.od-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:320px 1fr;gap:24px;align-items:start}@media(max-width:780px){.od-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}}.od-form,.od-listcard{border:3px solid #111;background:#fff}.od-form{padding:22px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:14px}.od-form h2,.od-listcard h2{margin:0;font-size:1.05rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.04em}.od-listcard h2{padding:18px 18px 0}.od-form label{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:6px;font-size:.78rem;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.03em}.od-form input,.od-form select{padding:11px 12px;border:2px solid #111;background:#fafafa;color:#111;font-size:.95rem;font-weight:500}.od-form button{margin-top:4px;padding:13px 16px;border:0;background:#111;color:#fff;font-weight:800;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.05em;cursor:pointer}.od-form button:disabled{opacity:.55;cursor:default}.od-msg{margin:0;min-height:1.1em;font-size:.82rem;font-weight:700}.od-msg.ok{color:#15803d}.od-msg.err{color:#b91c1c}.od-table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:.92rem;margin-top:14px}.od-table th,.od-table td{text-align:left;padding:12px 16px;border-top:2px solid #111}.od-table th{font-size:.7rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em;font-weight:800}.od-empty{text-align:center;opacity:.6;padding:24px 16px;border-top:2px solid #111}.od-pri{display:inline-block;padding:2px 9px;border:2px solid #111;font-size:.72rem;font-weight:800;text-transform:uppercase}.od-pri.urgent{background:#b91c1c;color:#fff}.od-pri.high{background:#f59e0b;color:#111}
blocks.js: (function(){var SAMPLE=[{title:'VPN access for new hire',requester:'Dana Kim',priority:'High',status:'Open'},{title:'Replace meeting-room display',requester:'Sam Ortiz',priority:'Medium',status:'Open'},{title:'Reset payroll export job',requester:'Lee Park',priority:'Urgent',status:'Open'}];var rows=document.getElementById('od-rows');function esc(s){return String(s==null?'':s).replace(/[&<>"']/g,function(c){return {'&':'&','<':'<','>':'>','"':'"',"'":'''}[c];});}function pri(p){var k=String(p||'').toLowerCase();var cls=k==='urgent'?'urgent':k==='high'?'high':'';return ''+esc(p||'—')+'';}function render(list){if(!list||!list.length){rows.innerHTML='No open requests.';return;}rows.innerHTML=list.map(function(r){return ''+esc(r.title)+''+esc(r.requester)+''+pri(r.priority)+''+esc(r.status||'Open')+'';}).join('');}function load(){fetch('/api/data/requests').then(function(r){return r.ok?r.json():null;}).then(function(d){var list=d&&(d.records||d.items||d.data||(Array.isArray(d)?d:null));if(!list||!list.length){render(SAMPLE);}else{render(list);}}).catch(function(){render(SAMPLE);});}var f=document.getElementById('od-form');var btn=document.getElementById('od-submit');var msg=document.getElementById('od-msg');f.addEventListener('submit',function(e){e.preventDefault();var title=(document.getElementById('od-title').value||'').trim();var requester=(document.getElementById('od-requester').value||'').trim();var priority=document.getElementById('od-priority').value;msg.className='od-msg';if(!title||!requester){msg.textContent='Title and requester are required.';msg.className='od-msg err';return;}btn.disabled=true;var orig=btn.textContent;btn.textContent='Submitting…';fetch('/api/data/requests',{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({title:title,requester:requester,priority:priority,status:'Open'})}).then(function(r){if(!r.ok)throw new Error('bad');return r.json();}).then(function(){f.reset();msg.textContent='Request submitted.';msg.className='od-msg ok';btn.textContent=orig;btn.disabled=false;load();}).catch(function(){msg.textContent='Something went wrong. Please try again.';msg.className='od-msg err';btn.textContent=orig;btn.disabled=false;});});load();})();

blocks.text: © Ops Desk · Internal request tracker · Staff use only
